eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 2:41 PM on JUL 5, 2026 Effective until 1:41 PM JUL 6, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: [07-05-2026 1405 HRS]
WILDFIRE near [Yarnell] is no longer threatening. [YCU-2408, YCU-2411, YCU-2414] under [SET] status may safety resume normal activities.
